creator: taoka@infonets.hiroshima-u.ac.jp
text:
In bacon/Makefile, the next sentence exists:

	@${ECHO} "       Please read the ${WRKSRC}/INSTALL file for info on configuring this program."

But INSTALL dosen't exist in ${WRKSRC}.

And, in this case, you should install INSTALL into
${PREFIX}/share/doc/bacon/.


S.TAOKA
